# CWE-488: cart data is bound to validated server session, not a client-supplied id.
lang: go
file: CWE-488-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func ViewCart(c *gin.Context) {
	sid, err := c.Cookie("session_id")
	if err != nil || sid != c.GetString("session_id") {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	items, _ := c.Get("cart")
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"items": items})
}

func AddCartItem(c *gin.Context) {
	sid, err := c.Cookie("session_id")
	if err != nil || sid != c.GetString("session_id") {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	items, _ := c.Get("cart")
	slice, _ := items.([]string)
	slice = append(slice, c.PostForm("sku"))
	c.Set("cart", slice)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
